---
title: "biomarkers_processing_pipeline"
author: "Clazz"
date: "2025-06-26"
output: html_document
---

```{r, include = F}

if (!require("pacman")) install.packages("pacman")

pacman::p_load(tidyverse, VIM, ggpubr, ggeffects, car, sjPlot,caret, ggrain, emmeans, skimr, lavaan, patchwork, lme4, lmerTest, gtsummary, huxtable, readxl, broom.mixed, pwrss, mediation)

```


#CSF values
```{r}

#ptau181, ttau: elecsys 
#p-tau217 (CSF): In-house  (Thijssen et al. Lancet Neurol 2021)
#Abeta40, Abta42, a-synuclein, IL-6, Neurogranin, NFL, sTREM2: NTK
#GAP43: In-house (Sandelius et al. 2019. PMID 30321501)
#sICAM1, VCAM1: Vascular Injury Panel 2 (human) kits #K15198D
#SNAP25: In-house (Brinkmalm et al. 2014. PMID 25418885)

biomarcadores_CSF <- read_delim("G:/My Drive/Data/ALFA+/data_raw/fluid_biomarkers/Biomarkers_Alfa_Cohort__Biomarkers_alfa_cohort_20241220142704(in).csv", 
    delim = ";", escape_double = FALSE, trim_ws = TRUE)%>%
  dplyr::select(Visit, idparticipante, collection_dt, Assay, SampleType, Result, Kit, ResultRecalc)%>%
  mutate(Kit = factor(Kit),
         SampleType = factor(SampleType),
         Assay = factor(Assay),
         Result= as.numeric(gsub("\\.", "", Result)) / 1000)%>%
  filter(SampleType == "CSF")%>%
  filter(Assay %in% c("a-Synuclein", "Abeta1-40", "Abeta1-42", "GAP43","GFAP", "IL-6", "Neurogranin", "NFL", "pTau181", "pTau217", "sICAM1", "SNAP25", "sTREM2", "sVCAM1","Synaptotagmin", "tTau", "YKL40", "S100"))%>%
  unique()%>%
  filter(!(Kit == "Elecsys" & Assay == "Abeta1-42"),
         !(Kit == "In-house (Karikari et al. Lancet Neurol 2020. Suarez-Calvet et al. 2020)" & Assay == "pTau181"),
         !(Kit == "In-house  (Thijssen et al. Lancet Neurol 2021)" & Assay == "tTau"),
         !(Kit == "In-house (Su?rez-Calvet et al. 2020)" & Assay == "pTau217"),
         !(Kit == "NTK" & Assay == "pTau181"),
         !(Kit == "NTK" & Assay == "tTau"),
         !(Kit == "In-house" & Assay == "tTau"),
         !(Kit == "In-house" & Assay == "pTau217"),
         !(Kit == "GFAP Discovery Kit #102336" & Assay == "GFAP"))%>%
  mutate(Result = ifelse(is.na(Result)&!is.na(ResultRecalc), as.numeric(gsub("\\.", "", ResultRecalc)) / 1000, Result))%>%
  dplyr::select(-ResultRecalc)%>%
  dplyr::select(-Kit)%>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Assay, values_from = Result, names_prefix = "CSF_")%>%
  rename(subject = idparticipante, 
         CSF_Abeta40 = `CSF_Abeta1-40`,
         CSF_Abeta42 = `CSF_Abeta1-42`)%>%
  mutate(CSF_Abeta_ratio = CSF_Abeta42/CSF_Abeta40,
         A = ifelse(CSF_Abeta_ratio>=0.071, 0, 1),
         AT= ifelse(CSF_pTau181<=24.00 & CSF_Abeta_ratio>=0.071, 1, 
                     ifelse(CSF_Abeta_ratio<0.071 & CSF_pTau181<=24.00, 2, 
                            ifelse(CSF_Abeta_ratio>=0.071 & CSF_pTau181>24.00, 3, 4))))%>%
  mutate(A = factor(A),
         AT = factor(AT))



write.csv(biomarcadores_CSF, file = "G:/My Drive/Data/ALFA+/data_cleaned/biomarkers_CSF_processed.csv", row.names = F)


#using NTK for amyloid means some NA with abeta42. Is this the best course of action still?
```

#Plasma values
plasma values are a mess - come back to later

```{r}
biomarcadores_PLASMA <- read_delim("G:/My Drive/Data/ALFA+/data_raw/fluid_biomarkers/Biomarkers_Alfa_Cohort__Biomarkers_alfa_cohort_20241220142704(in).csv", 
    delim = ";", escape_double = FALSE, trim_ws = TRUE)%>%
  dplyr::select(Visit, Session, idparticipante, collection_dt, Assay, SampleType, Result, Kit, ResultRecalc, LbNam)%>%
  mutate(Kit = factor(Kit),
         SampleType = factor(SampleType),
         Assay = factor(Assay),
         Result= as.numeric(gsub("\\.", "", Result)) / 1000)%>%
  filter(SampleType == "PLASMA")%>%
  mutate(Result = ifelse(!is.na(ResultRecalc), as.numeric(gsub("\\.", "", ResultRecalc)) / 1000, Result))%>%
  dplyr::select(-ResultRecalc) %>%
  filter(Assay %in% c("Abeta1-40", "Abeta1-42", "GFAP", "NFL", "pTau181", "pTau217", "sICAM1", "sVCAM1", "tTau", "ApoE4"),
         Visit %in% c("V1", "V2"))%>%
  filter((Kit == "N4PE (NEUROLOGY 4-PLEX E) #103670" & Assay %in% c("Abeta1-40", "Abeta1-42", "GFAP", "NFL")) |
       (Kit == "Advantage 2.1" & Assay == "pTau181") |
       (Kit == "NTK" & Assay == "pTau217")|
         Kit== "NTK" & Assay == "ApoE4")%>%
  filter(LbNam == "UGOT")
  
#need to finish pipeline once I know more from ferran
  pivot_wider(names_from = Assay, values_from = Result, names_prefix = "PLASMA_")

apoe<-biomarcadores_PLASMA%>%
  filter(Assay=="ApoE4")%>%
  dplyr::select(idparticipante, Visit, Result, collection_dt)%>%
  rename(subject = idparticipante)


write.csv(apoe, file = "G:/My Drive/Data/ALFA+/data_cleaned/biomarkers_plasma_apoe.csv", row.names = F)

#abeta1-40 = N4PE (NEUROLOGY 4-PLEX E) #103670
#abeta1-42 = N4PE (NEUROLOGY 4-PLEX E) #103670
#gfap = N4PE (NEUROLOGY 4-PLEX E) #103670
#nfl = N4PE (NEUROLOGY 4-PLEX E) #103670
# pTau181 Advantage 2.1
# ptau217 = NTK
```
